title: Electricity consumption data of natural persons (Valstybės duomenų agentūra)
description:
[Publisher: Valstybės duomenų agentūra] The table provides electricity consumption data for natural persons of the Energy Distribution Operator (ESO). The set is compiled by the State Data Agency. Addresses are provided in rectangular stalls of 1 kilometre size in the Lithuanian coordinate system (LKS-94). Electricity consumption data shall be provided with the accuracy of the month. Customer code, object code, phone number, and e-mail addresses are encrypted. The actual amount of electricity consumed may differ from the data provided in case the consumer incorrectly declares the amount of electricity consumed or has installed a solar power plant. Data time coverage: from 1 January 2019.

Contact the atverimas@stat.gov.lt for technical questions or possible errors.
